title: Bad scaling, if there are nasty forests of generate statements

features.name: multi-branch if-generate with single active leaf
features.description: Code should include a generate if-else chain with several mutually exclusive branches, each instantiating a different submodule, where exactly one branch is active based on a parameter value

features.name: case-generate with many branches, one active
features.description: Code should include a case-generate block with four or more case items, each instantiating a distinct submodule, controlled by a parameter that selects exactly one branch at elaboration time

features.name: multi-level non-recursive module hierarchy with generate at every level
features.description: Code should include a non-recursive multi-level module hierarchy where each level uses an if-generate block with multiple branches so that unreachable generate paths multiply exponentially across levels

features.name: generate block with submodule instantiation inside inactive branch
features.description: Code should include a generate if-else where the inactive branch references a module that itself contains further generate blocks, exercising dead-branch elaboration depth
